title: festuca arundinacea var. spuria
intro: Festuca arundinacea var. spuria, commonly known as tall fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Festuca arundinacea var. spuria include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and act as a natural antiseptic agent. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or tinctures, which are often used to treat minor wounds and skin conditions.
